title: Get Ready To ROAR With Tiger Beer At The 2024 AMVC … As! 4 Exciting Ways Tiger Beer Is Bringing The Roar To 2024 AMVCA - FinancialEDGE
description: The 2024 Africa Magic Viewers’ Choice Awards (AMVCAs) are almost here, and Tiger Beer is ready to turn up the volume! html:
The 2024 Africa Magic Viewers’ Choice Awards (AMVCAs) are almost here, and Tiger Beer is ready to turn up the volume! This year, Tiger Beer is sponsoring the Culture Day, the award category for the Multichoice Talent Factory and AMVCAs Afterparty!

As a proud sponsor, the bold, refreshing premium beer brand is bringing the heat with exciting activities that will have you roaring with excitement,

Here’s what to expect:

  1.  Tiger Beer Takes Over MultiChoice Talent Factory:

The premium beer brand is kicking off its activities with an exciting and insightful workshop for the Multichoice Talent Factorywhich took place at Multichoice Office on Friday, May 10, 2024.

The following day, the 2024 AMVCAs MultiChoice Talent Factory Award winner will walk away with a cool N1 million courtesy of Tiger Beer during the awards night. That’s a massive boost to kickstart the winner’s filmmaking dreams! This proves the premium beer’s commitment to encouraging creatives in film and entertainment to live uncaged.

  1. RAWR Your Style:

Fashionistas, get ready to unleash your inner RAWR! Tiger Beer will host a ‘My RAWR Outfit’ competition, with a sizzling N500,000 prize each for the best male and female looks on the main award day. So bring your A-game and showcase your most stylish RAWR!

  1. Get Up Close with the Stars – Tiger Beer Style:

Have you ever wondered what your favourite celebrities roar about? Tiger Beer has got you covered! Media personality extraordinaire, Noble Igwe will be interviewing the hottest stars on the red carpet, getting them to share their passions and, of course, unleash their ROAR!

  1. Dance Queen, Liquorose Takes the Stage at the Awards’ Afterparty!:

Get ready to be blown away by electrifying performances brought to you by Tiger Beer. The premium beer brand brings the incredible Liquorose to light up the Afterparty stage. Expect a show-stopping performance with amazing dancers and artists—you won’t want to miss it!

Tiger Beer is ensuring that this year’s AMVCAs is an unforgettable experience. Stay tuned for all the excitement, and get ready to ROAR with Tiger Beer!
